CustomField.description: Length of string in Requested Reviewers with commas, less length of string without commas, plus 1
CustomField.formula:
IF( CONTAINS( copado__Requested_Reviewers__c , copado__Username__c ),
(LEN( copado__Requested_Reviewers__c ) - LEN( SUBSTITUTE( copado__Requested_Reviewers__c, ',', '') )),
(LEN( copado__Requested_Reviewers__c ) - LEN( SUBSTITUTE( copado__Requested_Reviewers__c, ',', '') )) + 1)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Count of Reviewers Requested; the PR Submitter's Reviews are not counted amongst PR Metrics.
CustomField.label: Total Reviewers Requested
